mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_info_relation ( id, site_code, ancestor_agent_id, descendant_agent_id, agent_depth, creator, updater, created_time, updated_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{siteCode}, #{nodeId}, #{nodeId}, 0, #{operator}, #{operator}, #{now}, #{now} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE updated_time = updated_time

INSERT INTO agent_info_relation ( id, site_code, parent_node_id, child_node_id, distance, creator, updater, created_time, updated_time ) SELECT REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), #{siteCode}, parent_node_id, #{childNodeId}, distance + 1, #{operator}, #{operator}, #{now}, #{now} FROM agent_info_relation WHERE child_node_id = #{parentNodeId} AND site_code = #{siteCode} ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE updated_time = updated_time
